channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration lauds plastic surgeons' statement on trans surgery for minors
item.description: A patient who came to regret the top surgery she got as a teen won a $2 million malpractice suit. Then, the American Society of Plastic Surgeons clari...

item.title: This season, 'The Pitt' is about what doesn't happen in one day
item.description: The first season of The Pitt was about acute problems. The second is about chronic ones.

item.title: They're cured of leprosy. Why do they still live in leprosy colonies?
item.description: Leprosy is one of the least contagious diseases around — and perhaps one of the most misunderstood. The colonies are relics of a not-too-distant past ...

item.title: RFK Jr. speaks about beefing up red meat consumption at Cattle Con
item.description: Beef producers from around the country held a convention this week where they heard from Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr.,...

item.title: This Supplement Is Like An Ice Pack For Your Muscles & Joints*
item.description: Your muscles and joints work hard for you—how are you returning the favor?

item.title: This Healthy-ish Artichoke Dip Keeps All The Creaminess, Just With More Veggies
item.description: Your friends and family will beg you to bring this to the potluck.

item.title: This Week's Horoscope Has Sparks Flying Just In Time For V-Day
I’m A CPT But I’m Also A Homebody — My No. 1 Tip For Effective Home Workouts
You're Probably Doing Front Lunges Wrong—Here's How To Get It Right
item.description: If you aren't seeing any sort of results, there may be a good reason why.

item.title: California's largest children's hospital system ends gender-affirming care for youth
item.description: Two hospitals in California are discontinuing hormone treatments for transgender youth, citing Trump administration pressures. In the past year, many ...

item.title: Ways to Manage Blue Light for Better Sleep
Symptoms That May Point to Chronic Migraine
Best Fruits to Eat During Cancer Treatment
item.description: Fruits can support nutrition during cancer care. Learn which options may ease treatment side effects and offer potential protective benefits.
